steps.label: cause
steps.text: A wine placed on the European market contains sulfites above the legal declaration threshold.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Sulfites can trigger adverse reactions in susceptible consumers, so allergen-information rules require a visible declaration above the threshold.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The label states that the wine contains sulfites to inform consumers; the statement does not mean sulfites are absent below the threshold.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: sulfites above the legal threshold must be declared because they are regulated potential allergens.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
